review-scope-recorded.evidence: Example only: security review scope recorded for example-commit-or-tag.

release-candidate-reviewed.notes: Render and review the release-candidate bundle for the candidate.

operator-evidence-reviewed.notes: Review private operator evidence and copy only redacted summaries.

security-deferrals-named.notes: Name every accepted deferral in release notes.

webhook-signatures.notes: Review webhook signature checks and preflight posture.

github-app-permissions.notes: Compare production App settings to reviewed manifest or manual equivalent.

trusted-actor-admission.notes: Confirm public repo model calls require trusted actors.

base-ref-config.notes: Confirm target repo config is loaded from base-ref content.

provider-bounds.notes: Review provider context, timeout, and output caps.

provider-fail-closed.notes: Review provider error redaction and empty-output behavior.

runtime-pauses-first.notes: Confirm runtime pauses run before spend and dispatch.

budget-before-dispatch.notes: Confirm budget admission runs before queueing.

budget-policies-reviewed.notes: Review central DB budget policy evidence.

run-control-before-dispatch.notes: Review run-control claim order and dedupe key shape.

worker-dispatch-auth.notes: Review worker dispatch token source and App scope.

aws-least-privilege.notes: Review AWS policy evidence without live identifiers.

model-pricing-reviewed.notes: Review model price source evidence and any accepted overrides.

support-preflight-secret-presence.notes: Review support and preflight redaction behavior.

actions-pinned.notes: Run and review workflow action pin check.

public-artifacts-clean.notes: Run public artifact and env template checks.

alerts-safe.notes: Review alert payload sanitization and delivery summaries.

security-decision-recorded.notes: Record approve, approve with follow-up, defer, or block.
